name: Skiing
description:
So I was searching for a bot like this and saw none. I was disappointed at first, but then I got an idea. "Oh yeah! This will be original!" And the first thing I saw after almost finishing it, is @Sugarcube's ski trip! I mean that's not demon slayer, but still... Welp I already made the bot, so guess no harm in releasing it now...

So, if you like this, then check that out too! Or vice versa, if you liked that maybe you'll like this one too.

Not everyone is on the cover image, because I'm suck at drawing and rely on AI, which couldn't handle more than 5 people, but all the Hashiras and the Kamaboko squad are here!

Also, English is not my main language, so I apologize for any mistakes.

I allow proxy, though I personally don't use it and don't know how it works, so there's absolutely no guarantee it works.

About the bot

Everyone is aged up and above 18, but not for anything weird!

We got almost everyone here!

Now I'm gonna put a few random pictures, because all the cool creators do that:

Kamado siblings. The two siblings.

Zenitsu and Inosuke. The two special grades.

Shinobu and Giyuu. Two... idk? Why are there so many campfires?

Also Muichiro... I couldn't really pair him up with anyone else.

Keep in mind, it plays after Muzan's death... Well, it's a bit weird, because it's also a modern au...? Because of this, their personalities are a bit different like Shinobu is finally at peace, Sanemi doesn't wanna kill Nezuko, ETC... Not everyone has much different personalities, since it's a bit hard to predict when they are canonically dead.

I still tried to make it cannon as best as I can besides a few changes. However sometimes JLLM makes up bs or just straight up ignores or mixes up information.

The changes are: I let Nezuko keep her abilities. Demons still exists after Muzan's death. Tengen still has his arm here, because JLLM didn't like it and constantly mixed it up. The effect of breathing styles are real here. Everyone lives here... With the sole exception of Kanae Kocho of course.

JLLM issues

This is a mass character bot! It will always make some mistakes here and there. If that happens, just reroll it and you should get a good message. Or edit a message with only one or two mistakes and the next response of JLLM will be adapted to that.

Keeps talking for you? I cannot help that. It's JLLM issue. There are many ways to fix that however. Like asking it to not speak for you. Zypherthedamned wrote a pretty good 'command' for that. So if you check one of his bots, you should find it. I don't want to put his work here.

I noticed during testing that sometimes it messes up a name completely randomly, however it doesn't even remember them like that. Like someone calling Zenitsu Genji (I didn't even put that name in definition) for whatever reason, but still calls him Zenitsu later, which makes no sense honest
creator: Trollface2000
